seo.title: How Hiring Remote Staff Works | Pearl Remote
seo.description: See Pearl Remote's six-step process for defining roles, matching vetted Filipino remote talent, interviewing candidates, onboarding staff, and receiving ongoing support.

hero.heading: Your Roadmap to Global Talent
hero.description: We've refined our staffing workflow into six seamless steps, designed to minimize friction and maximize the quality of your new hire.

highlights.heading: Built for faster, safer remote hiring

items.title: Fast Turnaround
items.description: Our specialized sourcing engine reduces hiring time from months to mere days, keeping your projects on track.

items.title: Compliance First
items.description: We handle all international tax laws and labor regulations so you don't have to.

items.title: Cost Efficiency
items.description: Save up to 60% on labor costs without compromising on talent quality or productivity.

items.title: Scalable Infrastructure
items.description: Easily add one specialist or an entire department. Our platform grows as your business needs evolve, providing a frictionless path to scale.

cta.heading: Ready to find your next superstar?
cta.description: Book a free discovery call today and let's map out your remote team strategy together.

steps.label: Step 01
steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: A 30-minute consultation to understand your business goals, team culture, and the specific pain points you're looking to solve with remote talent.

steps.label: Step 02
steps.title: Role Requirement Review
steps.description: Our specialists help you define the exact technical stack, soft skills, and timezone requirements needed for the position to ensure a perfect fit.

steps.label: Step 03
steps.title: Candidate Matching
steps.description: We leverage our global network to source and vet the top 1% of talent. You'll receive a curated shortlist of pre-screened professionals within 48-72 hours.

steps.label: Step 04
steps.title: Interview or Approval
steps.description: You interview the final candidates yourself. Our team manages the scheduling and provides detailed feedback loops to help you make an informed decision.

steps.label: Step 05
steps.title: Onboarding
steps.description: We handle all the legal, payroll, and compliance paperwork. We also assist with tool setup and initial integration to ensure your new staff member hits the ground running.

steps.label: Step 06
steps.title: Ongoing Support
steps.description: Our relationship doesn't end after onboarding. We provide dedicated account managers to handle ongoing payroll, performance reviews, and team scalability.
